LanguageData.LBD_DragonSkyNukeStrike.label: Celestial Dragonfire
LanguageData.LBD_DragonSkyNukeStrike.description: Miraboreasu leaves the map, turns the sky crimson, and unleashes a two-stage burning strike before returning.
LanguageData.LBD_Upgrade_Skill.label: Battle Memories
LanguageData.LBD_Upgrade_Skill.description: Awaken battle memories of the dragon form, gaining new abilities and buffs.\n\nMemories gained are permanent and will not be drawn again.
LanguageData.LBD_TalkWith_BlackDragon.label: Talk with Mira
LanguageData.LBD_TalkWith_BlackDragon.description: Open the dialogue window with Miraboreasu.
